dr_question: In 2026, since a ransomware attack would not be just an IT issue but a risk to every function of MediConn Solutions, what specific architectural and procedural controls would a cybersecurity specialist need to design and implement to minimize the blast radius and ensure MediConn’s clinical continuity during an extended loss of services from one of their third-party providers?

question_source.dr_question: In 2026, since a ransomware attack would not be just an IT issue but a risk to every function of MediConn Solutions, what specific architectural and procedural controls would a cybersecurity specialist need to design and implement to minimize the blast radius and ensure MediConn’s clinical continuity during an extended loss of services from one of their third-party providers?
